title: [ImportVerilog] Add delete and clear ops for assoc arrays
body:
Implements `.Delete()` from IEEE Std 1800™-2023 7.9.2 but splits the method up into two `MooreOps`:
    - `AssocArrayDeleteOp` removes the given index and its corresponding element from the associative array
    - `AssocArrayClearOp` is for when no index is supplied to `.Delete()` and it removes every item from the associative array

The work is based on [#9632](https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9632) and the subsequent implementation of queues.
